meaning: n.(旧时狂欢节或庆祝场合抛撒的)糖果,(婚礼、狂欢节中抛撒的)五彩纸屑
examples: The custom of throwing confetti however, does not come from Italy.
An oil derrick showered silver confetti on the whooping crowd.
They grow wherever they emerge, rupturing our neat rows with impossibly pink balls of confetti.
At the precise stroke of nine there's a bang, and confetti showers the room.
It was an embarrassingly long and over-the-top game, complete with an obnoxious emcee and not-so-necessary confetti.
